gdalvector 0.0.3
  • Get started
  • Reference

Changelog

Source: CHANGELOG.md

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. The format is based on Keep a Changelog and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning.

[Unreleased]

Bug Fixes

  • opts: Address review feedback on PR #5 (#2) (438eaa6) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Fix initialization (20f2bad) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Configuration

  • ci: Standardize and streamline GitHub Actions workflows (40b431f) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • dev: Automate changelog generation and ignore during build (1f444a4) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • dev: Ensure .gitignore ends with a newline (dbcd5e0) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • vscode: Configure workspace for R and Quarto formatting (8cdf74d) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add Cursor IDE configuration for Tigris storage (10157bb) - (Jimmy Briggs)

DevOps

  • Remove Windows from R CMD CHECK matrix (b771416) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • github-actions: Add core workflows for R package CI (d76bd6a) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Documentation

  • design: Add comprehensive architecture and usage documentation (d12a5da) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • opts: Align builder roxygen with GDAL driver docs (#3) (4d7fd3a) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • opts: Add OpenFileGDB links fragment to gdb builders (#3) (2327a42) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • articles: Remove driver and concept documentation (1a4330a) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Improve link formatting in README (c653244) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add project banner to README (c0c8c48) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Remove .github/README.md (64c9973) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add and update project badges (fe1d158) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Features

  • dev: Add development scripts and package infrastructure setup (f31275a) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Refactoring

  • Streamline utility functions and update documentation (e9667da) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • opts: Add consistent ... pass-through to all typed builders (#2) (fa3ac9c) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • opts: Route option builders through shared .build_gdal_opts() (#1) (1a7f4a5) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdal_opts: Remove obsolete as_gdal_boolean helper (37aed58) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdal_opts: Remove redundant boolean conversion (785b11e) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdal_drivers: Consolidate option lookup logic (2f6c33c) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdal: Standardize object formatting and streamline internal utilities (cdfa33b) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • gdal-options: Standardize option normalization and boolean coercion (8c00bf5) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Styling

  • Standardize code formatting and improve readability (6af5f13) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Testing

  • opts: Require testthat (>= 3.1.0) and use expect_no_error() (#2) (1216bd4) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • options: Refactor and expand GDAL options test suite (aa7cbd9) - (Jimmy Briggs)

Changelog generated by git-cliff. ***
